protocol_override: User approved Codex/GPT self-judge instead of Gemini API.

parsed.signature_a: A computes a weighted bucket index, given normalized integer weights and a threshold, producing an index.
parsed.signature_b: B computes the greatest common divisor, given non-negative integers, producing a positive integer.

same_problem.why: The programs compute different outputs or solve different requested tasks.

same_technique.why: Both use shared technique(s): loop, precondition-check.

same_domain.why: Their primary data domains do not overlap.
